tasks.subject: Task 1: Add dependencies and restructure CLI with shared helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update Cargo.toml with new dependencies and rewrite main.rs with the new clap subcommand structure and all shared helper functions, while keeping the legacy flat-arg mode working exactly as before.

**Files:**
- Modify: `sunnyside/Cargo.toml`
- Modify: `sunnyside/src/main.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `cargo build` succeeds with zero errors
- [ ] `./target/debug/sunnyside --help` lists both `bu` and `rs` subcommands
- [ ] `./target/debug/sunnyside bu --help` shows `--target`, `--shift`, `--key`, `--dest` flags
- [ ] Legacy mode still works: echo hi > /tmp/ss_test.txt && sunnyside -t /tmp/ss_test.txt -s 0 -k x produces /tmp/ss_test.tyz

**Verify:** `cargo build 2>&1 | tail -2` → `Finished dev [unoptimized + debuginfo] target(s) in X.XXs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunnyside/Cargo.toml", "sunnyside/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunnyside && cargo build 2>&1 | tail -2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cargo build succeeds", "sunnyside --help lists bu and rs", "legacy flat-arg mode still works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement bu subcommand
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement `compress_target` (parallel gzip tar archive) and `do_bu` (4-stage backup pipeline), replacing the Task 1 stub.

**Files:**
- Modify: `sunnyside/src/main.rs` (add gzp import, compress_target function, replace do_bu stub)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `cargo build` succeeds
- [ ] `sunnyside bu -t <file> -s 4 -k u -d /tmp/bu_test.tyz` creates `/tmp/bu_test.tyz`
- [ ] `sunnyside bu -t <dir> -s 4 -k u -d /tmp/bu_dir.tyz` creates `/tmp/bu_dir.tyz`
- [ ] No temp dir remains after successful bu
- [ ] `--target` file/directory is not modified by bu

**Verify:** `cargo build && echo TEST > /tmp/bu_src.txt && ./target/debug/sunnyside bu -t /tmp/bu_src.txt -s 4 -k u -d /tmp/bu_out.tyz && ls -lh /tmp/bu_out.tyz` → shows file with non-zero size

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunnyside/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunnyside && cargo build && echo TEST > /tmp/bu_src.txt && ./target/debug/sunnyside bu -t /tmp/bu_src.txt -s 4 -k u -d /tmp/bu_out.tyz && ls -lh /tmp/bu_out.tyz", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cargo build succeeds", "bu creates dest file", "bu works on directories", "no temp dir remains", "source not modified"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Implement rs subcommand
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement `extract_archive` (multi-member gzip decompression + tar extraction) and `do_rs` (4-stage restore pipeline). Must use `MultiGzDecoder` because `gzp` emits concatenated multi-member gzip.

**Files:**
- Modify: `sunnyside/src/main.rs` (add flate2 + BufReader imports, extract_archive function, replace do_rs stub)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `cargo build` succeeds
- [ ] File round-trip: bu a file then rs it → restored content matches original
- [ ] Directory round-trip: bu a directory then rs it → restored structure matches original
- [ ] No temp dir remains after successful rs
- [ ] `--target` backup file is not modified or deleted by rs

**Verify:** `echo ROUNDTRIP > /tmp/rt_src.txt && ./target/debug/sunnyside bu -t /tmp/rt_src.txt -s 4 -k u -d /tmp/rt.tyz && ./target/debug/sunnyside rs -t /tmp/rt.tyz -s 4 -k u -d /tmp/rt_out.txt && cat /tmp/rt_out.txt` → `ROUNDTRIP`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunnyside/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunnyside && echo ROUNDTRIP > /tmp/rt_src.txt && ./target/debug/sunnyside bu -t /tmp/rt_src.txt -s 4 -k u -d /tmp/rt.tyz && ./target/debug/sunnyside rs -t /tmp/rt.tyz -s 4 -k u -d /tmp/rt_out.txt && cat /tmp/rt_out.txt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cargo build succeeds", "file round-trip restores content", "directory round-trip restores structure", "no temp dirs remain", "source backup not modified"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: anixpkgs integration — package update and regression tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update the anixpkgs sunnyside package to point at the new sunnyside version, update the cargo hash, and add bu/rs regression tests to `test_sunnyside.sh`. Requires Tasks 1–3 pushed to GitHub.

**Files:**
- Modify: `anixpkgs/pkgs/rust-packages/sunnyside/default.nix`
- Modify: `anixpkgs/test/test_sunnyside.sh`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `nix flake update sunnyside` completes in anixpkgs
- [ ] anixpkgs sunnyside package builds without hash mismatch errors
- [ ] bu/rs regression tests pass

**Verify:** `cd anixpkgs && nix-shell test/shell.nix --run "cd test && bash test_sunnyside.sh"` exits 0 with no red output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["anixpkgs/pkgs/rust-packages/sunnyside/default.nix", "anixpkgs/test/test_sunnyside.sh"], "verifyCommand": "cd anixpkgs && nix-shell test/shell.nix --run \"cd test && bash test_sunnyside.sh\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flake.lock updated", "package builds with correct cargoHash", "bu/rs regression tests pass"]}
```
